item.title: Job Halted Midway on a $15,000 Project
item.description: A construction job was stopped in the middle, putting a $15,000 project at risk. This video follows the jobsite situation and the impact on the work already underway. What happens next?

media:content.media:title: Job Halted Midway on a $15,000 Project
media:content.media:description: A construction job was stopped in the middle, putting a $15,000 project at risk. This video follows the jobsite situation and the impact on the work already underway. What happens next?

item.title: Using These Tools Can Save Money on the Job
item.description: The right tools can reduce waste, speed up work, and prevent costly mistakes. Here are practical job-site tools that help save both time and money.

media:content.media:title: Using These Tools Can Save Money on the Job
media:content.media:description: The right tools can reduce waste, speed up work, and prevent costly mistakes. Here are practical job-site tools that help save both time and money.

item.title: Going the Extra Mile on a Low-Income Build
item.description: A construction project focused on helping a low-income build shows how extra effort, smart planning, and practical solutions can make a big difference without breaking the budget.

media:content.media:title: Going the Extra Mile on a Low-Income Build
media:content.media:description: A construction project focused on helping a low-income build shows how extra effort, smart planning, and practical solutions can make a big difference without breaking the budget.

item.title: Dream Home Journey Continues in Episode 34
item.description: The dream home journey continues in Episode 34, following the building process and project progress. A straightforward look at the work behind the home as it moves forward. What comes next?

media:content.media:title: Dream Home Journey Continues in Episode 34
media:content.media:description: The dream home journey continues in Episode 34, following the building process and project progress. A straightforward look at the work behind the home as it moves forward. What comes next?
